title: Restore CKC character and avatar database core parity
operator_request: Original CKC was a character/avatar database with character data sheets reusable in CUI workflows, porn production workflows, Unreal, Blender, and other pipelines.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Start by reading current Rust Atelier models/routes and MT-003 parity map. Preserve existing backend authority and PostgreSQL/EventLedger stance.

scope.summary: Make Castkit Codex inside Atelier a real reusable character/avatar database with editable sheets and versioned data.
base_scope: Audit current Rust Atelier character/profile data models and UI.
Implement or complete character/avatar sheet create, edit, read, version, and reuse paths.
Expose stable model-facing IDs and backend routes for character sheet operations.
Make character data usable by downstream CUI, porn production, Unreal, Blender, and other Handshake workflows through typed references, not copy-paste text.
Update internal UserManual with the CKC character sheet workflow.
acceptance_criteria: An operator/model can create or select a CKC character and view/edit its character sheet.
Character sheets have stable IDs and version references.
Other Handshake modules can reference a CKC sheet/version through typed refs.
Argus can inspect and steer the CKC character sheet surface.
verification: Backend/model tests for sheet round-trip and version references.
Native UI tests for CKC sheet display/edit affordances.
Argus visual inspection evidence for the CKC sheet surface.

handoff.summary: Implementation started: audit current backend/native CKC character-sheet support, then add the smallest typed sheet/version/UI surface that satisfies MT-009 without disturbing parallel work.
